the exception is thrown if there is constraint violation error returned by database on insert.
we have two constraints for schema_set table: 
1) FK to dataspace table
2) unique name + dataspace_id combination

due to we check dataspace referenced before schema_set insert, 
the only case remaining is the schema_set name duplication (within same dataspace)
